author: christopher

transcript.text: Hey! Yes, loud and clear.    Looks like the garden is still waiting to be introduced to me   we haven't done the walkthrough yet. raw_transcript:
USER: Hello, can you hear me?
SLARTI: Hey! Yes, loud and clear.    Looks like the garden is still waiting to be introduced to me   we haven't done the walkthrough yet. When you're ready, just say `!setup` and we'll go bed by bed and get everything recorded.  Also   80 degrees at the end of March in Farmington? That's a warm one. Hope the garden is enjoying it.
